Gap Description: No documentation on integrating zipBoard with CI/CD pipelines such as GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins for automated feedback collection on builds.
Suggested Title: CI/CD Integration Guide for Automated Review Workflows

Gap Description: Missing articles on WCAG compliance, accessibility audits, and how to conduct accessibility testing within zipBoard projects.
Suggested Title: Accessibility Auditing and WCAG Compliance in zipBoard

Gap Description: Limited guidance on diagnosing and resolving AdBlocker or browser‑extension conflicts that prevent annotations or video recordings from working.
Suggested Title: AdBlocker & Browser Extension Troubleshooting for zipBoard Features

Gap Description: No detailed documentation on SSO configuration, IP whitelisting, and granular permission settings for enterprise‑level security controls.
Suggested Title: Enterprise Security Setup: SSO, Whitelisting, and Permissions

Gap Description: Insufficient coverage of webhook creation, event mapping, and use‑case examples for automating workflows via the zipBoard API and external automation tools.
Suggested Title: Webhooks and API Automation: Building Custom Integration Workflows
